languages.original_text: "The flora displays heightened adaptability and aggression that is rarely characteristic of its kind. I suspect external xeno-interference. Nuncius, make all the necessary preparations for collecting test samples."

languages.text: "Флора демонстрирует повышенную адаптируемость и агрессию, что редко свойственно ее роду. Подозреваю, было совершено ксенотическое вмешательство извне. Нунциус, приготовь все необходимое для сбора опытных образцов".
languages.translation_comment: the characters made a difficult landing on a planet with a very hostile ecosystem

languages.text: "The flora displays heightened adaptability and aggression that is rarely characteristic of its kind. I suspect external xeno-interference. Nuncius, make all the necessary preparations for collecting test samples."

"The flora displays heightened adaptability and aggression that is rarely characteristic of its kind. I suspect external xeno-interference. Nuncius, make all the necessary preparations for collecting test samples."

"The flora displays heightened adaptability and aggression that is rarely characteristic of its kind. I suspect external xeno-interference. Nuncius, make all the necessary preparations for collecting test samples."

languages.text: 「この植物は、その種に稀に見る適応力と攻撃性を示している。外部の異種干渉を疑う」
languages.original_text: "The flora displays heightened adaptability and aggression that is rarely characteristic of its kind. I suspect external xeno-interference."

traits.locale_text: 「この植物は、その種に稀に見る適応力と攻撃性を示している。外部の異種干渉を疑う。」

languages.text: « La flore présente une capacité d'adaptation développée et une agressivité élevée que l'on observe rarement chez ces espèces. Je soupçonne des interférences xénos externes. Nuncius, il faut immédiatement commencer les préparatifs de collecte d'échantillons. »
languages.original_text: "The flora displays heightened adaptability and aggression that is rarely characteristic of its kind. I suspect external xeno-interference. Nuncius, make all the necessary preparations for collecting test samples."

traits.locale_text: « La flore présente une capacité d'adaptation développée et une agressivité élevée que l'on observe rarement chez ces espèces. Je soupçonne des interférences xénos externes. Nuncius, il faut immédiatement commencer les préparatifs de collecte d'échantillons. »

languages.text: "Die Flora weist eine erhöhte Adaptabilität und Aggression auf, die für ihre Art charakteristisch ist. Ich befürchte eine externe Xeno-Interferenz. Nuncius, trefft alle erforderlichen Vorbereitung für die Beschaffung von Proben."
languages.original_text: "The flora displays heightened adaptability and aggression that is rarely characteristic of its kind. I suspect external xeno-interference. Nuncius, make all the necessary preparations for collecting test samples."

traits.locale_text: "Die Flora weist eine erhöhte Adaptabilität und Aggression auf, die für ihre Art charakteristisch ist. Ich befürchte eine externe Xeno-Interferenz. Nuncius, trefft alle erforderlichen Vorbereitung für die Beschaffung von Proben."

languages.text: "Flora, türünün nadiren özelliği olan yüksek uyum yeteneği ve saldırganlık sergiliyor. Dışarıdan zeno müdahalesi olduğundan şüpheleniyorum. Nuncius, test numuneleri toplamak için gerekli tüm hazırlıkları yap."
languages.original_text: "The flora displays heightened adaptability and aggression that is rarely characteristic of its kind. I suspect external xeno-interference. Nuncius, make all the necessary preparations for collecting test samples."

traits.locale_text: "Flora, türünün nadiren özelliği olan yüksek uyum yeteneği ve saldırganlık sergiliyor. Dışarıdan zeno müdahalesi olduğundan şüpheleniyorum. Nuncius, test numuneleri toplamak için gerekli tüm hazırlıkları yap."

languages.text: «La flora exhibe niveles elevados de adaptabilidad y agresividad impropios de su especie. Sospecho la injerencia de xenos en su desarrollo. Nuncius, ejecute los preparativos necesarios para la toma de muestras».
languages.original_text: "The flora displays heightened adaptability and aggression that is rarely characteristic of its kind. I suspect external xeno-interference. Nuncius, make all the necessary preparations for collecting test samples."

traits.locale_text: «La flora exhibe niveles elevados de adaptabilidad y agresividad impropios de su especie. Sospecho la injerencia de xenos en su desarrollo. Nuncius, ejecute los preparativos necesarios para la toma de muestras».

languages.text: “这些植物表现出极强的适应性和攻击性，这在其同类中实属罕见。我怀疑有外来异形势力的介入。努恩修斯，做好采集测试样本的一切必要准备。”
languages.original_text: "The flora displays heightened adaptability and aggression that is rarely characteristic of its kind. I suspect external xeno-interference. Nuncius, make all the necessary preparations for collecting test samples."
